title: Go embedded SPA and static/uploads serving boundary

implementation.embedded_spa: Go serves the bundled go-shadow/web/dist artifact for / and client-side routes.
implementation.api_fallback: Unmatched /api/* paths return JSON 404 and never fall through to the SPA index.

path_safety: uses the existing upload filename resolver for clean slash-separated paths
rejects parent traversal, empty paths, absolute paths, volume paths, and unsafe path parts

evidence: fresh embedded SPA returns index.html for / and client routes
/static/uploads/t036.png returns exact fixture bytes with image/png
/api/not-real returns JSON API route not found
encoded traversal and upload directory requests do not expose adjacent files

next_recommended_task.reason: Static/security/full workflow proof is closed; the next smallest local-only gate is Windows package smoke before any Pi staging work.
